items.title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning (Bishop)
items.author: Christopher M. Bishop
items.note: Chapter on linear models for classification: sigmoid activation, cross-entropy, and probabilistic interpretation.

items.title: The Elements of Statistical Learning (Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman)
items.author: Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman
items.note: Logistic regression, logit transform, and linear decision boundaries in supervised learning.

items.title: Generalized Linear Models (Nelder & Wedderburn, 1972)
items.author: Nelder, Wedderburn
items.note: Original GLM framework placing logistic regression with logit link and Bernoulli log-likelihood.

items.title: scikit-learn LogisticRegression documentation
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: API for fitting binary and multi-class logistic models with log-loss objective.
